headline: Hims & Hers Stock Plunges Post Q1 Earnings Miss, Gross Margin Down
summary: HIMS reports an adjusted loss and a revenue miss in first-quarter 2026 as gross margin decreases, but it lifts its full-year revenue outlook.

headline: Rosarium Health Raises $6M In Seed Funding Round To Provide Reliable And Faster In-Home Care For Aging Populations
summary: Rosarium Health, a Black-founded healthtech company supporting in-home care for aging populations, has secured new funding.

headline: Best Growth Stocks to Buy for May 12th
